'''labate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kindheartedly|kindheartedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kindheartedly|kindheartedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| labate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:labate|labate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:labatesher|labatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:labatesherĂ«m|labatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:labatero|labatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:labateshĂ«|labateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:labateshĂ«m|labateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilabatero|gokilabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilabateshĂ«|gokilabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilabateshĂ«m|gokilabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golabankerom|golabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golabankeshĂ«|golabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golabankeshĂ«m|golabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golabankeya|golabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:labaterom|labaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:labatemu|labatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:labateya|labateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilabaterom|gokilabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilabatemu|gokilabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilabateya|gokilabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lababate|lababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lababatesher|lababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lababatesherĂ«m|lababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lababatero|lababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lababateshĂ«|lababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lababateshĂ«m|lababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilababatero|gokilababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilababateshĂ«|gokilababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilababateshĂ«m|gokilababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golababankerom|golababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golababankeshĂ«|golababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golababankeshĂ«m|golababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golababankeya|golababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lababaterom|lababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lababatemu|lababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lababateya|lababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilababaterom|gokilababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilababatemu|gokilababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilababateya|gokilababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠbĂŠte|lĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠbĂŠtesher|lĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠbĂŠtero|lĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠbĂŠtero|gokilĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠbĂŠnkerom|golĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠbĂŠnkeya|golĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠbĂŠterom|lĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠbĂŠtemu|lĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠbĂŠteya|lĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠbĂŠterom|gokilĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠbĂŠteya|gokilĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafbafte|lafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafbaftesher|lafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafbaftesherĂ«m|lafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafbaftero|lafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafbafteshĂ«|lafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafbafteshĂ«m|lafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafbaftero|gokilafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafbafteshĂ«|gokilafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafbafteshĂ«m|gokilafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafbafnkerom|golafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafbafnkeshĂ«|golafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafbafnkeshĂ«m|golafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafbafnkeya|golafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafbafterom|lafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafbaftemu|lafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafbafteya|lafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafbafterom|gokilafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafbaftemu|gokilafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafbafteya|gokilafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
